suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Repair the `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` Task model configuration or explicitly codify the current manual fallback path in the skill so scrutiny validators can complete per-feature reviews without subagent fan-out when the model is unavailable.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: This milestone attempted five `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` Task launches for `packet-governance-baseline`, `fix-base-runtime-enforcement-null-admission`, `preflight-review-merged-auth-company-admin-hardening`, `close-auth-merge-gate-regressions`, and `merge-gate-release-governance-review`; every launch failed immediately with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-high`, so the scrutiny validator had to review handoffs, transcript skeletons, and commit diffs directly and author the review JSON files in-session.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: When mission governance depends on preserved executable-spec artifacts that are not present on the active integration branch, the bootstrap guidance should explicitly name that branch/path and note any missing governance skill assets so workers do not need to rediscover the fallback source of truth.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The reviewed `preflight-review-merged-auth-company-admin-hardening` feature succeeded, but its handoff and review both noted that the packet-governance skill/artifacts were not available on active `Factory-droid` and the executable-spec package had to be recovered from `docs/packet-governance-baseline` before the packet-boundary review could proceed.
